import pathlib

# Fix slide-02: h3 font-size 28px, scrollHeight 35 > clientHeight 34
# Need line-height that gives at least 35px: 35/28 = 1.25. Use 1.35 for safety
f = pathlib.Path\('slide-02.html'\)
html = f.read_text\(encoding='utf-8'\)
html = html.replace\(
    ".stat-info h3{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:28px;font-weight:700;line-height:1.2;overflow:visible}",
    ".stat-info h3{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:26px;font-weight:700;line-height:1.4;overflow:visible}"
\)
f.write_text\(html, encoding='utf-8'\)
print\('slide-02 fixed \(font 26px, lh 1.4\)'\)
PYEOF)

Bash(cd "D:\\_bootstrap\\slides-grab" && python3 << 'PYEOF'
import re
with open\('output/elevenlabs-svg-test/slide-06-stt-api.svg', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    svg = f.read\(\)
# Find all non-ASCII chars remaining as text \(not inside base64\)
# Remove base64 data first
clean = re.sub\(r'data:image/png;base64,[A-Za-z0-9+/=]+', '', svg\)
special = {}
for ch in clean:
    cp = ord\(ch\)
    if cp > 0x7F and not \(0xAC00 <= cp <= 0xD7AF\) and not \(0x3130 <= cp <= 0x318F\):
        if cp > 0xFF:
            key = f'U+{cp:04X}\({ch}\)'
            special[key] = special.get\(key, 0\) + 1
for k, v in sorted\(special.items\(\)\):
    print\(f'{v:3d}x {k}'\)
PYEOF)

Bash(cd "D:\\_bootstrap\\slides-grab" && for s in 06-stt-api 11-demo 14-direction 05-web-ui-sfx-video 07-stt-comparison; do echo "=== slide-$s ===" && python3 << PYEOF
import re
with open\('output/elevenlabs-svg-test3/slide-${s}.svg', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    svg = f.read\(\)
imgs = len\(re.findall\(r'data:image/png;base64,', svg\)\)
clean = re.sub\(r'data:image/png;base64,[A-Za-z0-9+/=]+', '', svg\)
special = {}
for ch in clean:
    cp = ord\(ch\)
    if cp > 0xFF and not \(0xAC00 <= cp <= 0xD7AF\) and not \(0x3130 <= cp <= 0x318F\) and not \(0x2000 <= cp <= 0x206F\):
        key = f'U+{cp:04X}\({ch}\)'
        special[key] = special.get\(key, 0\) + 1
if special:
    print\(f'  Images: {imgs} | Remaining: {", ".join\(f"{v}x {k}" for k,v in sorted\(special.items\(\)\)\)}'\)
else:
    print\(f'  Images: {imgs} | All special chars rasterized'\)
PYEOF
done)

import re
with open\('output/mirofish-svg-test3/slide-${s}.svg', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    svg = f.read\(\)
imgs = len\(re.findall\(r'data:image/png;base64,', svg\)\)
clean = re.sub\(r'data:image/png;base64,[A-Za-z0-9+/=]+', '', svg\)
special = {}
for ch in clean:
    cp = ord\(ch\)
    if cp > 0xFF and not \(0xAC00 <= cp <= 0xD7AF\) and not \(0x3130 <= cp <= 0x318F\) and not \(0x2000 <= cp <= 0x206F\) and not \(0x1100 <= cp <= 0x11FF\):
        key = f'U+{cp:04X}\({ch}\)'
        special[key] = special.get\(key, 0\) + 1
if special:
    print\(f'  Images: {imgs} | Remaining: {", ".join\(f"{v}x {k}" for k,v in sorted\(special.items\(\)\)\)}'\)
else:
    print\(f'  Images: {imgs} | All special chars rasterized'\)
PYEOF
done)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import re
with open\('output/elevenlabs-svg-test3/slide-04-web-ui-tts.svg', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Find all tspan with textLength - check if tts-desc has similar issue
pattern = r'class="tts-desc"[^>]*>.*?<text[^>]*>\(.*?\)</text>'
matches = re.findall\(pattern, content\)
for i, m in enumerate\(matches\):
    print\(f'tts-desc {i}: {m}'\)
    print\('---'\)

# Also check the font-size for tts-label vs tts-desc
label_text_pattern = r'class="tts-label"[^>]*><text\([^>]*\)>'
label_matches = re.findall\(label_text_pattern, content\)
for i, m in enumerate\(label_matches\):
    print\(f'tts-label text attrs {i}: {m}'\)
    
desc_text_pattern = r'class="tts-desc"[^>]*><text\([^>]*\)>'
desc_matches = re.findall\(desc_text_pattern, content\)
for i, m in enumerate\(desc_matches\):
    print\(f'tts-desc text attrs {i}: {m}'\)
PYEOF)

Bash(cd "D:\\_bootstrap\\slides-grab" && python3 << 'PYEOF'
import re

svg = open\('output/figma-test/slide-01-title.svg', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)

# Check for masks
masks = re.findall\(r'<mask\\b[^>]*>.*?</mask>', svg, re.DOTALL\)
print\(f'mask 요소 수: {len\(masks\)}'\)
for i, m in enumerate\(masks\):
    print\(f'  [{i+1}] {m[:200]}'\)
    print\(\)

# Check for mask references
mask_refs = re.findall\(r'mask="[^"]*"', svg\)
print\(f'mask 참조 수: {len\(mask_refs\)}'\)
for r in mask_refs:
    print\(f'  {r}'\)
print\(\)

# Check g nesting depth for text
# Find a text element and count parent g elements
text_pos = svg.find\('<text '\)
if text_pos >= 0:
    prefix = svg[:text_pos]
    opens = prefix.count\('<g '\)
    closes = prefix.count\('</g>'\)
    depth = opens - closes
    print\(f'text 요소의 <g> 중첩 깊이: {depth}'\)

# Check data-* attributes on g elements
data_attrs = re.findall\(r'<g\\b[^>]*data-[^>]*>', svg\)
print\(f'\\ndata-* 속성이 있는 <g> 수: {len\(data_attrs\)}'\)

# Check aria-* attributes
aria_attrs = re.findall\(r'aria-\\w+="[^"]*"', svg\)
print\(f'aria-* 속성 수: {len\(aria_attrs\)}'\)
PYEOF)

Bash(cd "D:\\_bootstrap\\slides-grab" && python3 << 'PYEOF'
import re

svg = open\('output/figma-test2/slide-01-title.svg', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)

# Check structural issues
masks = re.findall\(r'<mask\\b', svg\)
mask_refs = re.findall\(r'mask="', svg\)
data_attrs = re.findall\(r'data-\\w+="', svg\)
aria_attrs = re.findall\(r'aria-\\w+="', svg\)

# Count g nesting depth for first text
text_pos = svg.find\('<text '\)
if text_pos >= 0:
    prefix = svg[:text_pos]
    opens = prefix.count\('<g'\)
    closes = prefix.count\('</g>'\)
    depth = opens - closes
else:
    depth = -1

print\(f'mask 요소: {len\(masks\)}'\)
print\(f'mask 참조: {len\(mask_refs\)}'\)
print\(f'data-* 속성: {len\(data_attrs\)}'\)
print\(f'aria-* 속성: {len\(aria_attrs\)}'\)
print\(f'text 중첩 깊이: {depth}'\)
print\(f'SVG 크기: {len\(svg\)} bytes'\)
print\(\)

# Show the text elements
texts = re.findall\(r'<text\\b[^>]*>[^<]*</text>', svg\)
for i, t in enumerate\(texts[:3]\):
    print\(f'[{i+1}] {t}'\)
    print\(\)
PYEOF)

Bash(cd "D:\\_bootstrap\\slides-grab" && python3 << 'PYEOF'
import re

# Compare: before \(no textLength, default ls\) vs after \(compensated ls\)
before = open\('output/svg-normal/slide-01-title.svg', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)
after = open\('output/svg-aligned/slide-01-title.svg', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)

def extract_texts\(svg\):
    return re.findall\(r'<text\\b\([^>]*\)>\([^<]*\)</text>', svg\)

print\("=== BEFORE \(no compensation\) ==="\)
for attrs, content in extract_texts\(before\):
    ls = re.search\(r'letter-spacing="\([^"]*\)"', attrs\)
    print\(f'  "{content[:30]}" ls={ls.group\(1\) if ls else "none"}'\)

print\(\)
print\("=== AFTER \(compensated\) ==="\)
for attrs, content in extract_texts\(after\):
    ls = re.search\(r'letter-spacing="\([^"]*\)"', attrs\)
    print\(f'  "{content[:30]}" ls={ls.group\(1\) if ls else "none"}'\)
PYEOF)
